prose:
Method–provenance block
Property: HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap) in eV.
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitted) run in PySCF v?.
Geometry provenance: single-point at the fixed geometry supplied in /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz; no further optimisation (DFT//input-xyz).
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation model).
Charge & multiplicity: 0, 1 (closed-shell singlet).
Software/backend: PySCF via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill; SCF converged in 9 cycles.
Convergence & warnings: SCF converged. no warnings reported.

Headline result
HOMO = –5.553772 eV
LUMO = –0.2489544 eV
HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV

Reproducibility
CLI command actually run (from result JSON):
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmh2800h2/live.json
The engine’s live stdout/stderr log was streamed to frontier_orbitals_<timestamp>.out in the working directory (path was printed when the job launched and can be tail-followed for full SCF details). The structured result is available at /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpmh2800h2/live.json

No experimental comparison is offered; this is a computed value.
